# Transcrição: My_purpose_in_life

- **Fonte:** My_purpose_in_life
- **Duração:** 01:25
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:25]

I really feel a huge part of my purpose is to help other people shine bright. My name in Vietnamese means forever light and my dad has always said to me, my grandma who gave me this necklace has always said to me, you are like a candle and your light burns really strong and when you go out there in life you will find many people who have a candle but their light has been blown out and it's a part of your duty in this life to go and use your strong light to light up other people's candles and what happens there is that when you light up other people's candles if you light up this person's candle and this person is a mother they will go home that evening and they'll light up their children's candles and those children they'll go to school the next day and they'll light up some of their friends candles that need to be lit. That simple little story my my grandmother and my dad used to tell me when I was young really influenced who I've become. I hope that I can be a light for you all and there'll be times when my light gets put out as much as my name is forever light I'm sure there'll be a time when my light gets put out and when it does maybe you can reach your candle and help me ignite mine but other than that remember it's not just me that's a candle all of you are so if you all got something positive from this take some of that positivity and share it with someone else and again cheesy as this sounds but that's how we make the world a better place.
